title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 30.330 - Official records, retention and destruction, duties
text:
30.330.  Official records, retention and destruction, duties. — The state treasurer shall keep such records as may be necessary for the proper performance of his duties.  He shall file, retain, store and destroy those records in accordance with the state and local records law.
(RSMo 1939 § 13058, A.L. 1945 p. 1977 § 24, A.L. 1983 H.B. 713 Revision) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11434; 1919 § 13340; 1909 § 11841 
Records retention and destruction, duties, Chap. 109
